headline: Got $2,500? 1 Unstoppable Medical Juggernaut to Buy Hand Over Fist and Hold for the Next 20 Years
summary: For an investor in their 50s or 60s who is finished chasing trends, Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) is a stock worth owning for decades because it pairs inelastic demand for medical devices with a 49th consecutive year of dividend increases. A $2,500 stake at the current $80.33 share price buys roughly 31 shares of a business engineered ... Got $2,500? 1 Unstoppable Medical Juggernaut to Buy Hand Over Fist and Hold for the Next 20 Years

headline: BofA Lowers PT on Medtronic (MDT) Stock
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June. On June 12, BofA reduced its price objective on the company’s stock to $95 from $110 and maintained a “Buy” rating on the shares. The firm’s services team has been highlighting a lower utilization environment, and thus, the analyst became more conservative […]

headline: Analyst Lowers Medtronic (MDT) Price Target by $15. Here is Why
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.59%, Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) is included among the 12 High Yield Fortune 500 Stocks to Buy Now. Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) develops, manufactures, and sells device-based medical therapies to healthcare systems, physicians, clinicians, and patients in the United States, Ireland, and internationally.
